Appearances:
Plaintiff Alfonso Chang is present.
Attorney David Foran for the plaintiff.
Defendant Wing Lok Chu is present.
Attorney Carolyn Gold appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of April 10, 2017 is vacated. (501)
